CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-29-2026 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Mitchell Wong, esq. specially appeared on behalf of plaintiff. Pursuant to plaintiff's request, the court ordered the case dismissed without prejudice and with the court retaining jurisdiction C.C.P. 664.6. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk: D. Diaz; Not reported. (610)
